DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER TAI'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. IT APPEARS THAT DEFENDANT HAS FILED THE VERIFICATIONS IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING, THUS RENDERING THE MOTION MOOT. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF HAS REFUSED TO WITHDRAW THE MOTION SEEKING MONETARY COMPENSATION FOR DEFENDANT'S DELAY IN FILING THE NECESSARY VERIFICATIONS. DEFENDANT HAS PROVIDED NO JUSTIFICATION FOR HIS FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE REQUIREMENTS AND THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT $660.00, PAYMENT OF WHICH SHOULD BE MADE BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. MOVING PARTY HAS SUBMITTED A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM WHICH THE COURT WILL SIGN.JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)**AFTER THE HEARING, ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS**

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Written Discovery; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER TAI's Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions.

IT APPEARS THAT DEFENDANT HAS FILED THE VERIFICATIONS IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING, THUS RENDERING THE MOTION MOOT. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF HAS REFUSED TO WITHDRAW THE MOTION SEEKING MONETARY COMPENSATION FOR DEFENDANT'S DELAY IN FILING THE NECESSARY VERIFICATIONS. DEFENDANT HAS PROVIDED NO JUSTIFICATION FOR HIS FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE REQUIREMENTS AND THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT $660.00, PAYMENT OF WHICH SHOULD BE MADE BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

Moving party has submitted a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem which the Court will sign.**

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

**After the hearing, order is sgned. (see scanned order for details**
